meaning: 贾夫纳[斯里兰卡北部港市](位于贾夫纳半岛的西南部)
examples: Mr. Thomas would be given safe passage to and from Jaffna.
Back in Jaffna, he hopes to go back to Palali one day.
They are now approaching Elephant Pass, which connects Jaffna to the rest of the country.
Restaurants along the highway to Jaffna in the north are mostly army-owned or -run.
On the Jaffna Peninsula the army converted a former officers' mess into a 22-room luxury resort.
